candidates.name: workflow-planner
candidates.description: Plan specifications and requirements before implementation.

candidates.name: implementation-tester
candidates.description: Implement features and test code changes.

candidates.name: code-reviewer
candidates.description: Review code for security and quality before merge.

candidates.name: bug-debugger
candidates.description: Debug code bugs and diagnose failures.

candidates.name: api-deployer
candidates.description: Deploy API releases after tests pass.

candidates.name: browser-ui-tester
candidates.description: Test browser UI behavior and verify the interface.

candidates.name: api-migrator
candidates.description: Migrate API contracts and verify compatibility.

candidates.name: api-monitor
candidates.description: Monitor API performance and diagnose failures.

candidates.name: generic-context
candidates.description: Skills, code, agents, documents, and reviews are background context.

cases.task: Plan the specification and requirements.
规划规范和需求。
Implement the feature and test the code.
实现功能并测试代码。
Review the code for security before merge.
合并前审查代码安全。
Publish the GitHub release.
发布 GitHub 版本。
Debug the code bug and diagnose the failure.
调试代码错误并诊断故障。
Deploy the API release.
部署 API 版本。
Test the browser UI and verify the interface.
测试浏览器界面并验证 UI。
Write and document the README.
编写 README 文档。
Research and analyze the security risks.
调研并分析安全风险。
Migrate the API contract and verify compatibility.
迁移 API 规范并验证兼容性。
Monitor API performance and diagnose failures.
监控 API 性能并诊断故障。
Plan requirements, implement the feature, test code, and publish the GitHub release.
规划需求、实现功能、测试代码并发布 GitHub 版本。
Skills, code, agents, documents, and reviews are background context.
Skill、代码、智能体、文档和审查只是背景信息。
Do not publish or deploy a release; only describe the background context.
不要发布或部署版本，只说明背景信息。
